_comment: Phase 4.1 reliability held-out partition — Wave F3 FULLY SEALED. Drawn from data/reliability-claim-corpus.json (50 claims, schema=15/math=15/code=13/spec=7) using pre-registered seed 'phase4-section-4.1-rng-2025'. Stratified 20% draw via mulberry32(fnv1a32(seed)). Held-out partition_size=10 (sidecar partition_hash=cfd81fa1e68395b1…). Reproduce via: node packages/benchmark/calibration/scripts/seal-reliability-corpus.mjs.
